nodes.context: Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in Marano di Napoli and Spain, involved in drug trafficking and money laundering.
Camorra clan, predecessors of the Polverino clan.
Calabrian mafia organization, supplied with hashish by the Polverino clan.
Sicilian criminal organization, supplied with hashish by the Polverino clan.
Apulian mafia organization, supplied with hashish by the Polverino clan.
Sicilian Mafia families from Palermo, with whom the Polverino clan has a good relationship.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the investigations, the Polverinos are considered the successors of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.context: Polverino clan is the successor of the Nuvoletta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: The clan started as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan, but has become independent and one of the most powerful groups of the Camorra over the time, surpassing the Nuvolettas
edges.context: Polverino clan originated as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan and later surpassed them.

edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, was dubbed the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.

Giuseppe Polverino, was dubbed the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.context: Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sicilian Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, was dubbed the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.context: Polverino clan supplied hashish to Sacra Corona Unita.

edges.evidence_quote: The clan is known to have a good relationship with the Cosa Nostra families from Palermo.
edges.context: Polverino clan has a good relationship with Cosa Nostra families from Palermo.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan, Orlando clan, Mallardo clan, Lubrano-Ligato clan, Licciardi clan, Cosa Nostra
edges.context: Polverino clan is allied with Orlando clan per infobox.
